Class 1: Header too low (Bocconcino).description: White-header invoice: grey-band fallback picks product metadata band below real column headers; crop top cuts off first rows.

Class 2: Header search too late (Mammafi.description: White-header search zone (≥38% height) excludes real headers; grey fallback picks footer summary band; all rows excluded.

Class 3: Footer below totals (Emporio).description: Table-anchored footer crop starts below grey Subtotal/Total box; GPT sees IVA/banking only.

Class 4: PDF storage (geometry N/A).description: Storage file is PDF; imagescript cannot decode; geometry and OCR blocked.

Class 5: Header mis-detection (other).description: Grey-header or other template with >30px header delta without white-header pattern.
